svg.title: VoiceDesk microservices architecture
svg.desc: Six microservices communicating via API gateway and message queue, with shared infrastructure

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the React frontend connect to the API gateway?')
sendPrompt('How do VoIP calls enter the system?')
sendPrompt('What does the API gateway do in a microservices setup?')

svg.text: core microservices — each owns its own data

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me the user-service folder structure and routes')
sendPrompt('Show me the ticket-service API endpoints')
sendPrompt('How does the notification service send Slack and email alerts?')
sendPrompt('Show me the call-service VoIP integration with Twilio')
sendPrompt('Show me the chatbot-service LLM integration code')
sendPrompt('How does the analytics-service aggregate metrics?')
sendPrompt('How does Vault inject secrets into Kubernetes pods?')
sendPrompt('How does Prometheus scrape metrics from each microservice?')
sendPrompt('How does Loki aggregate logs from all microservices?')
sendPrompt('Show me the Grafana dashboard setup for microservices')

svg.text: deployment layer — one Helm chart per service

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me the MicroK8s Helm chart structure for the user-service')
sendPrompt('Show me the ArgoCD ApplicationSet for all microservices')
sendPrompt('How does Jenkins build and push each microservice independently?')
